getCartProductModifyView.query:
query getCartProductModifyView($cartProductId: String!, $deviceType: DeviceType!) {
  getCartProductModifyView: getCartProductModifyViewShopperGW(
    cartProductId: $cartProductId
    deviceType: $deviceType
  ) {
    authenticationType
    blackConsumer
    memberId
    cartProductId
    channel {
      channelName
      channelNo
      channelUid
      channelSiteFullUrl
      naSiteId
      naverPaySellerNo
      sellerExternalStatusType
      __typename
    }
    channelServiceType
    deliveryFee {
      deliveryFee {
        ...deliveryFeeField
        __typename
      }
      deliveryFeePolicy {
        ...deliveryFeePolicyField
        __typename
      }
      __typename
    }
    bundleDeliveryFee {
      ...bundleProductDeliveryFeeField
      __typename
    }
    deliveryFeePayType
    deliveryMethodType
    discount {
      ...cartProductDiscountField
      __typename
    }
    hopeDelivery {
      additionalFee
      hopeDeliveryDate
      hopeDeliveryTime
      region
      __typename
    }
    items {
      ...cartViewProductItemField
      __typename
    }
    merchant {
      customerCenterTelNo
      merchantName
      merchantNo
      merchantStatus
      merchantUrl
      __typename
    }
    name
    optionUsable
    overseaDelivery
    preOrder {
      deliveryEndDateTime
      deliveryStartDateTime
      minOrderQuantity
      __typename
    }
    productCombinationOptions {
      id
      productId
      groupNames
      names
      stockQuantity
      salePrice
      price
      optionAdditionalFee
      sellerManagerCode
      todayDispatch
      status
      __typename
    }
    productId
    productNo
    productDelivery {
      deliveryFeeType
      deliveryFeePayType
      deliveryMethodTypes
      baseFee
      freeConditionalAmount
      repeatQuantity
      secondBaseQuantity
      secondExtraFee
      thirdBaseQuantity
      thirdExtraFee
      deliveryAreaType
      area2ExtraFee
      area3ExtraFee
      visitAddressId
      quickServiceArea
      deliveryAttributeType
      customProductAfterOrder
      dispatchSalesDay
      todayDispatchBasisTime
      todayStockQuantity
      __typename
    }
    productOptions {
      groupName
      id
      name
      optionType
      productId
      todayDispatch
      __typename
    }
    productStatus
    productSupplements {
      groupName
      id
      name
      price
      productId
      productStatusType
      sellerManagementCode
      stockQuantity
      __typename
    }
    productUrl
    purchasable
    purchasableItemExist
    purchaseQuantityPolicy {
      maxPurchaseQuantityPerId
      maxPurchaseQuantityPerOrder
      minPurchaseQuantity
      __typename
    }
    registerDateTime
    representImageUrl
    saleEndDateTime
    salePrice
    saleStartDateTime
    sellerUrl
    stockQuantity
    storeKeepExclusiveProduct
    subscriber
    supplementUsable
    totalPrice
    totalQuantity
    unpurchasableReasons {
      ...unpurchasableReasonField
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

fragment deliveryFeeField on DeliveryFee {
  deliveryFeePayType
  deliveryFeeType
  deliveryMethodType
  selectedDeliveryFeePayType
  fee
  discountedFee
  __typename
}

fragment deliveryFeePolicyField on DeliveryFeePolicy {
  baseDeliveryFee
  deliveryFeePayType
  deliveryFeeType
  deliveryMethodTypes
  freeBasisAmountCondition
  membershipFreeBasisAmountCondition
  repeatQuantity
  section2ExtendedDeliveryFee
  section2Quantity
  section3ExtendedDeliveryFee
  section3Quantity
  __typename
}

fragment bundleProductDeliveryFeeField on BundleProductDeliveryFee {
  bundlePolicy {
    bundleKey
    packingPolicy
    deliveryAreaType
    __typename
  }
  deliveryFee {
    ...deliveryFeeField
    __typename
  }
  deliveryFeePolicy {
    ...deliveryFeePolicyField
    __typename
  }
  productDeliveryBundleGroup {
    area2ExtraFee
    area3ExtraFee
    bundleGroupId
    deliveryAreaType
    deliveryFeeChargeMethodType
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}

fragment cartProductDiscountField on CartProductDiscount {
  itemDiscountFee
  managerImmediateDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicy {
      managerImmediateDiscountCostRatio
      managerImmediateDiscountLimitedCountPerUser
      managerImmediateDiscountMaxAmount
      managerImmediateDiscountMobileOnly
      managerImmediateDiscountPolicyNo
      managerImmediateDiscountValue
      managerImmediateDiscountValueUnit
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  multiPurchaseDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicy {
      multiPurchaseDiscountValue
      multiPurchaseDiscountValueUnit
      multiPurchaseOrderUnit
      multiPurchaseOrderValue
      multiPurchaseDiscountStartDate
      multiPurchaseDiscountEndDate
      isMultiPurchaseDiscountEndDate
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  quantityIgnoreDiscountMap
  sellerImmediateDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicy {
      sellerImmediateDiscountPolicyNo
      sellerImmediateDiscountValue
      sellerImmediateDiscountValueUnit
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  specialDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicyList {
      specialDiscountType
      specialDiscountValue
      specialDiscountValueUnit
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  totalDiscountFee
  totalPrice
  __typename
}

fragment cartViewProductItemField on CartViewProductItem {
  cartProductItemId
  contentNames
  elements {
    elementId
    groupNames
    todayDispatch
    type
    values
    __typename
  }
  itemNo
  price
  purchasable
  quantity
  supplementNames
  optionAdditionalFee
  type
  unpurchasableReasons {
    ...unpurchasableReasonField
    __typename
  }
  updateNudge
  __typename
}

fragment unpurchasableReasonField on UnpurchasableReason {
  cartProductId
  cartProductItemId
  targetType
  type
  productId
  itemNo
  imageType
  messageArgs
  purchasableQuantity
  __typename
}

getGeneralCartCacheView.query:
query getGeneralCartCacheView($channelNo: BigInt, $nudgeProdId: BigInt) {
  getGeneralCartCacheView: getGeneralCartCacheViewShopperGW(
    channelNo: $channelNo
    nudgeProdId: $nudgeProdId
  ) {
    itemsCount
    productsCount
    memberId
    stores {
      ...cartViewStoreField
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

getCartViewStores.query:
query getCartViewStores($sellerNos: [BigInt]!, $deviceType: DeviceType, $cartTypes: [String]!, $shpLiveExtras: String) {
  getCartViewStores: getCartViewStoresShopperGW(
    sellerNos: $sellerNos
    deviceType: $deviceType
    cartTypes: $cartTypes
    shpLiveExtras: $shpLiveExtras
  ) {
    itemsCount
    productsCount
    memberId
    membershipDetail {
      membership
      membershipNudgeType
      couponDiscount
      customTitle
      membershipDeliveryBenefitType
      __typename
    }
    stores {
      ...cartViewStoreField
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

    immediateDiscountPrice
    firstImmediateDiscountPrice
    __typename
  }
  pointAccumulationAvailable
  benefitExcluded
  lastAddedDateTime
  __typename
}

fragment bundleProductDeliveryFeeField on BundleProductDeliveryFee {
  bundlePolicy {
    bundleKey
    packingPolicy
    deliveryAreaType
    __typename
  }
  deliveryFee {
    ...deliveryFeeField
    __typename
  }
  deliveryFeePolicy {
    ...deliveryFeePolicyField
    __typename
  }
  productDeliveryBundleGroup {
    area2ExtraFee
    area3ExtraFee
    bundleGroupId
    deliveryAreaType
    deliveryFeeChargeMethodType
    __typename
  }
  __typename
}

fragment deliveryFeeField on DeliveryFee {
  deliveryFeePayType
  deliveryFeeType
  deliveryMethodType
  selectedDeliveryFeePayType
  fee
  discountedFee
  __typename
}

fragment deliveryFeePolicyField on DeliveryFeePolicy {
  baseDeliveryFee
  deliveryFeePayType
  deliveryFeeType
  deliveryMethodTypes
  freeBasisAmountCondition
  membershipFreeBasisAmountCondition
  repeatQuantity
  section2ExtendedDeliveryFee
  section2Quantity
  section3ExtendedDeliveryFee
  section3Quantity
  __typename
}

fragment cartProductDiscountField on CartProductDiscount {
  itemDiscountFee
  managerImmediateDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicy {
      managerImmediateDiscountCostRatio
      managerImmediateDiscountLimitedCountPerUser
      managerImmediateDiscountMaxAmount
      managerImmediateDiscountMobileOnly
      managerImmediateDiscountPolicyNo
      managerImmediateDiscountValue
      managerImmediateDiscountValueUnit
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  multiPurchaseDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicy {
      multiPurchaseDiscountValue
      multiPurchaseDiscountValueUnit
      multiPurchaseOrderUnit
      multiPurchaseOrderValue
      multiPurchaseDiscountStartDate
      multiPurchaseDiscountEndDate
      isMultiPurchaseDiscountEndDate
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  quantityIgnoreDiscountMap
  sellerImmediateDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicy {
      sellerImmediateDiscountPolicyNo
      sellerImmediateDiscountValue
      sellerImmediateDiscountValueUnit
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  specialDiscount {
    applyCount
    baseSalePrice
    discountPolicyList {
      specialDiscountType
      specialDiscountValue
      specialDiscountValueUnit
      __typename
    }
    discountValue
    quantity
    unitBaseSalePrice
    unitDiscountValue
    __typename
  }
  totalDiscountFee
  totalPrice
  __typename
}

fragment cartViewProductItemField on CartViewProductItem {
  cartProductItemId
  contentNames
  elements {
    elementId
    groupNames
    todayDispatch
    type
    values
    __typename
  }
  itemNo
  price
  purchasable
  quantity
  supplementNames
  optionAdditionalFee
  type
  unpurchasableReasons {
    ...unpurchasableReasonField
    __typename
  }
  updateNudge
  __typename
}

  cartProductId
  cartProductItemId
  targetType
  type

  messageArgs

getCardPromotions.query:
mutation getCardPromotions($cardPromotionsRequestInput: CardPromotionsRequestInput!) {
  getCardPromotions: getCardPromotions(
    cardPromotionsRequestInput: $cardPromotionsRequestInput
  ) {
    maxDiscountValue
    cardPromotions {
      promotionSequence
      promotionKind
      promotionName
      promotionCardCompanyName
      cardType
      cardOwnerType
      promotionUnit
      promotionValue
      minPaymentAmount
      maxPromotionAmount
      promotionStartDateTime
      promotionEndDateTime
      overlapParticipation
      maxOverlapCount
      caution
      applicableChannelProductNo
      userParticipation
      userParticipationText
      maxBurdenComeAmount
      applyObjectDisplayMessage
      cardCompanyImageUrl
      affiliateCard
      cardProductCodes
      cardProductName
      cardProductGroupCode
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}
